hero.headline: Uganda: The Emerald Sanctuary
hero.subHeadline: Venture into the Bwindi Impenetrable Forest for a four-hour 'Habituation' encounter.

theNyotaLens.architectNote: Uganda is our primate specialty. We are designing 'Habituation Circuits' in Rushaga, allowing you four hours—instead of one—with the mountain gorillas.

sensoryChapters.narrativeBody: It starts with the mist rising over the Virungas. We trek deep into the ancient canopy to find the keepers of the forest.
A walking encounter with the original forest people, sharing the botanical secrets of the Impenetrable Forest.
The volcanic lakes of western Uganda. A serene, water-based reprieve after the intensity of the trek.

pairsWellWith.reasoning: The transition from the arid North of Kenya to the lush rainforests of Uganda is a sensory masterclass.
